title: Hook adapter validated hop + write-guard store/root split + tool-level ambiguity deny — parity and contract tests
action: Per D2/D4 and review repairs, run in the SHARED checkout after wt-1. Mirror wt-1's typed resolver semantics in both adapter copies without importing state.mjs: ctx.root stays canonical physical workRoot; ctx.storeRoot and ctx.worktreeResolution ordinary|linked-valid|linked-invalid are consumed only by bee-write-guard. Adapter returns typed state rather than throwing so host errors remain fail-open; every write-capable tool receives a typed deny on linked-invalid before mutation. Before logical reservation normalization, canonicalize workRoot and prove target containment: existing targets use realpath; new targets canonicalize the nearest existing ancestor then append unresolved segments; reject outside-root absolute targets, any relative result containing .., symlink escape, and Windows separator/case escape. Only contained targets become repo-relative reservation keys. Add RED-first rows for every write-tool class across traversal, absolute-main path, symlink escape, new-file ancestor, Windows separators/case, linked-invalid, owner allow, and foreign-holder deny; read-only/ordinary controls stay unchanged. Extend test_lib_mirror with a mechanically derived production-hook inventory: parse hooks/hooks.json and hooks/claude-hooks.json command targets, take the transitive closure of safe same-directory static relative imports (currently adapter), and compare that expected set with direct .bee/bin/hooks files for missing, extra, and byte drift. Source-only catalog/tests/JSON configs are excluded by derivation, never a hand list. Self-test injected missing/extra/diff. Keep declared hook pairs synchronized and regenerate release manifest before verify.

truths: ctx.root stays canonical workRoot and only bee-write-guard consumes typed storeRoot/resolution
every write-capable tool denies linked-invalid before mutation without turning host crashes fail-closed
canonical containment is proven before reservation normalization for existing and new targets
absolute-main, traversal, symlink, unresolved-new-file, and Windows separator/case escapes are denied across every write tool
contained owner/foreign reservation behavior and ordinary/read-only controls remain unchanged
runtime hook inventory is derived from both launcher projections plus transitive safe relative imports
derived inventory contains every launcher/import-reachable runtime module and no source-only files
missing, extra, and byte-drift runtime hook cases are self-tested
release manifest is regenerated and green
artifacts: typed adapter context and containment-aware write guard in both runtime/source pairs
RED-first containment, resolution, and reservation rows in hook tests
prohibitions: allowing .., absolute outside-root, symlink, or Windows case/separator escapes
changing ctx.root meaning, other hook consumers, or reservation semantics

verify: node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Hook resolution now separates canonical workRoot from validated storeRoot, denies ambiguous/escaping writes across every tool class, and derives complete runtime hook mirror parity.
trace.verification_evidence: {"tests_inspected":["hooks/test_write_guard.mjs","hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs","scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs","scripts/release_manifest.mjs"],"tests_added_or_changed":["hooks/test_write_guard.mjs: linked store/root, linked-invalid, owner/foreign, traversal, absolute-main, symlink, unresolved-new-file, Windows separator/case rows across Edit/Write/MultiEdit/Bash/apply_patch","hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs: typed linked-valid/linked-invalid/separate-git-dir adapter contract rows","scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs: launcher/import-derived hook inventory with injected missing/extra/byte-drift self-test"],"red_failure_evidence":"RED-first run: existing rows stayed green while 40 new worktree matrix assertions failed before adapter/guard implementation (5 main-store reservation, 5 linked-invalid, 30 canonical escape rows).","verification_run":"node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check -> write guard ALL PASS; hook contracts 148 rows/0 failures; lib and 9 runtime hooks byte-identical; manifest 136 files match","deliberate_exceptions":["Exactly one cell commit could not be created because .git is read-only in the active Codex sandbox; no workaround attempted."]}
